videoSnippet.title: I'm not Locked in Here with You... || Praggnanandhaa vs Vidit || Tech Mahindra Global Chess League
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Praggnanandhaa R (2663) - Vidit, Santosh Gujrathi (2650)
Tech Mahindra Global Chess League (Chess.com) [06-01] 2025.12.23
C48 Four knights, Rubinstein counter-gambit

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Nc3 Nf6 4.Bb5 Nd4 5.Bc4 Bc5 6.Nxe5 Qe7 7.Nd3 d5 8.Bxd5 Bg4 9.f3 Nxf3+ 10.gxf3 Nxd5 11.Qe2 Nxc3 12.dxc3 Be6 13.Be3 Bb6 14.a4 O-O 15.O-O-O Rfd8 16.Kb1 Qe8 17.b3 Ba5 18.Bd4 f6 19.Rhg1 Kh8 20.Rg3 Bb6 21.Rdg1 Rd7 22.a5 Bxd4 23.cxd4 g6 24.Qf2 b6 25.h4 c6 26.h5 gxh5 27.R3g2 Qf7 28.Nf4 Bxb3 29.Rg7 Ba2+ 30.Kb2 Qc4 31.Rxd7 Qb4+ 32.Kxa2 bxa5 33.Qe3 Qa4+ 34.Qa3 Qxc2+ 35.Qb2

opening.name: Four Knights Game: Spanish Variation, Rubinstein Variation

judgment.name: Mistake
judgment.comment: Checkmate is now unavoidable. Qc4+ was best.

analysis.variation: Ka1 c5 Qxa5 Qb2+ Kxb2 Rb8+ Ka2 h6 Rh7+ Kxh7 Qc7+ Kh8

judgment.name: Inaccuracy
judgment.comment: Lost forced checkmate sequence. Ka1 was best.
